title: Garlicky Light Slovakian Rice Dumplings
description: Fluffy rice dumplings seasoned with garlic and lime leaves, panfried to a golden crisp-perfect for a quick, lowcalorie Slovakian meal.
instructions: Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and lightly coat with 1 tsp of olive oil.
In a large bowl whisk the egg whites until frothy, then fold in the cooked rice, flour, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and shredded lime leaves until well combined.
Divide the mixture into 8 equal portions and shape each into a round dumpling, about 3 inches in diameter.
Place the dumplings gently into the hot skillet, cooking 2–3 minutes per side until golden brown and puffed.
Use a spatula to flip each dumpling once, ensuring even browning on both sides.
Once cooked, transfer dumplings to a paper towel‑lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve warm, optionally with a light yogurt drizzle or a squeeze of fresh lime juice.
Enjoy your quick, garlicky Slovakian rice dumplings!
